		birth_date = -70.1.1
		death_date = 13.2.15
		dynasty = antq_wang_clan

		first_name = { name = antq_erato_armenia }
		culture = antq_armenian
		religion = antq_arsacid_zoroastrianism
		female = yes
		dynasty = antq_artaxiad_dynasty
		tag = XAO
	}

	antq_pharasmanes_i = {
		first_name = { name = antq_pharasmanes_i }
		culture = antq_kartvelian
		religion = antq_arsacid_zoroastrianism
		dynasty = antq_pharnavazid_dynasty
		tag = IBR
	}

}
